raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sauls un Jonatans miḣ- 
ligi un laiputgi fawa Dsihwo- 
fchanā/ ne irr arri fawa Mir- 
fchanā afschkirti/ tee btja weeg- 
laki ne ka Ehrgtk/ un stiprakī ne 
ka Lauwas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs Israēta Meitas/rand- 
dajt pahr Saulu/ kas juhs ap- 
tehrpe ar dahrgahm farkanahm 
Drehbehm frabfchni/ kas juhs 
pufchkoja ar seta Glihtumeim pee 
jnhfahn Drehbehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka irr tee Warrenee krit- 
tuschi Raufchanas Widdū? Jo- 
natans irr nokauts us teem Aug- 
stumeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mantr schehl tewis pehz/ 
mans Brahlis Jonatans/ tu biji 
man fohti miḣtsch/ tawa Mih- 
lestiba btja man faldaka/ ne ka 
Seewu Mihlestiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka irr tee Warrenee krit- 
tuschi/ un tahs Karzu Brunnas 
sudduschas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta II. Nodalla.
Dahwids tohp Eebronāpahr Jubda Zilki par 
Kehniku swaidihts: 1/ 4. Pateiz teem Ee- 
dsīhwotajeem no Jabeṣa par to Peetizzibu/ ko 
winni Saulam un winna Ochleem parahdij, 
schi: 5. Abners darra Jsbosetu Saula 
Dehlu par Kehniku pahr tahm zittahm Zil- 
tim: 8. Behg preeksch Joaba: 12/ 17. No, 
dutz behgdams Asaēlu: 13.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ehz to waizaja Dahwids 
B to KUNGU/ un fazzija: 
Buhs man us weenu no 
Juhda Pilsfahteem zeltees? un 
tas KUNGSfazzija us to: Zel- 
lees. Tad fazzija Dahwids: Us 
kurren buhs man eet? un wiṡch 
fazzija: Us Eebronu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Dahwids us
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "turren lihdsar fawahm diwi See- 
wahm/ Akinoamn to Jesreelite- 
reni/ un Abiaqili/ Nahbala ta 
Karmelitena Seewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids likke arridsan 
fawus Wihrus/ kas pee winna 
bija/ tekatru ar fainu Nammu us 
turren eet/ un tee dsihwoja Ge- 
brona Pilsfahtōs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz nahze tee Wihri no Juha- 
da/ un fwaidija tur Dahwidu 
par Kehniku pahr to Nammu 
Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwidam tappe stah- 
stihts un fazzihis: Tee Wihri no 
Jabeṣa eekch Gileadas irr Sau- 
lu aprakluschi/ tad fuhtija Dah- 
wids Webstineschus pee teen 
Wihreem no Jabeṣa eekch Gile- 
adas/ un likke teem fazzihis: 
Swehtiti ehat juhs tam KUN- 
GAM/ka juhs scho Labdarrischau- 
nu ehat parahdihtchi pee juhsu 
Kunga/ pee Saula/ un ehat win- 
nu aprakluschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad lai nu Deivs jums 
atkat parahda Labdarrischann un 
Peetizzibu/ un es arridsan grib- 
bu jums labbu darriht/ par to/ 
ka juhs scho Leetu ehat darrijfschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu stiprinajeet fawas 
Rohkas/ un eheet firdigi/ tapehz 
ta juhtu Kunga Sauls nomirris 
irr/ tad irr arri tas Namis Juha- 
da mannī par Kehniku pahr fe- 
wim fwaidijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Abners Nera Dehls/ 
Saula Karza Leels-Kunga/ neh- 
me Jsbosetu Saula Dehlu/ un 
pahrwedde to us Maanaim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
